name: Portuguese Sweet Bread 2
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons instant potato flakes (or 1/4 cup mashed potato)
1/8 teaspoon lemon juice or grated rind of 1/2 lemon
2 cups bread flour or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except the egg white, in a food processor on the basic dough cycle according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. After the Dough Cycle beeps, remove the dough from the machine onto a floured cutting board.
3. Grease an 8-inch or 9-inch pie tin.
4. Gently roll the dough into a 30-inch rope, starting at one end and twisting the roll to the opposite end.
5. Place one end of the rope in the center of the pie tin and carefully wrap it around itself, filling the pan.
6. Cover and let rise in a warm oven for 1 hour or until doubled in size.
7. Turn off the oven (150°F for 2 to 5 minutes) and place the covered dough on the low rack in the center to continue rising.
8. Remove the bread from the oven and preheat it to 325°F.
9. Brush the dough with egg white.
10. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes until golden brown. Remove and cool.
